# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/envoy-admin-access.log"
  address:
    socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 9901 }

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 80 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: service_backend
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match: { prefix: "/" }
                route:
                  cluster: service_cluster
  clusters:
  - name: service_cluster
    type: strict_dns
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address: { address: "127.0.0.1", port_value: 9999 }
    http_codec_options:
      frame_size: {}
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    tls_context:
      common_tls_context: { tls_certificate_sds_secret_configs: ["%EMPTY%"], validation_context: { trusted_ca: { filename: "/etc/envoy/ssl/upstreamca.crt" }, allow_failed_validation: false } }
    transport_socket:
      name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
      config:
        common_tls_context: { tls_certificate_sds_secret_configs: ["%EMPTY%"], validation_context: { trusted_ca: { filename: "/etc/envoy/ssl/upstreamca.crt" }, allow_failed_validation: false } }
    retry_policy:
      retry_on: "5xx,gateway-error,service-unavailable,connect-failure"
      num_retries: 2
    outlier_detection: { interval: 10s, base_ejection_time: 300s }
    common_http_protocol_options: {}
    hcm_idle_timeout: 60s
